action.finish_summary: Elicited requirements for a map-based website with location search and navigation directions: (1) Core map interactions include zooming, dragging/panning to explore areas, and placing pins/markers on locations; (2) Visual styling uses a light pink global background color with all UI pieces styled hotpink; (3) A minimalist/simplified visual theme is preferred over a standard dense street-map style; (4) Any visible UI controls (zoom buttons, add marker button, clear markers button, etc.) should follow the hotpink styling. Many specific details remain undecided by the user, including: marker draggability, marker labels/popups, how markers are placed (click vs. button mode), marker removal, search input types accepted, search result display behavior, search bar positioning, navigation direction display format (line only vs. step-by-step text), how start/end points are specified for navigation, initial map centering behavior, points of interest visibility, and overall layout arrangement (full-screen map vs. sidebar panel).
